entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: videos
description: 在Remotion中嵌入视频 - 修剪、音量、速度、循环、音高
metadata:
  tags: video, media, trim, volume, speed, loop, pitch
---

entries.en-US: # Using videos in Remotion
entries.zh-Hans: # 在 Remotion 中使用视频

entries.en-US: ## Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ## 先决条件

entries.en-US:
First, the @remotion/media package needs to be installed.
If it is not, use the following command:
entries.zh-Hans:
首先，需要安装 @remotion/media 包。
如果尚未安装，请使用以下命令：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: Use `<Video>` from `@remotion/media` to embed videos into your composition.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `<Video>` 从 `@remotion/media` 将视频嵌入到你的合成中。

entries.en-US: Remote URLs are also supported:
entries.zh-Hans: 也支持远程 URL：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video src="https://remotion.media/video.mp4" />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video src="https://remotion.media/video.mp4" />
```

entries.en-US: ## Trimming
entries.zh-Hans: ## 修剪

entries.en-US: Use `trimBefore` and `trimAfter` to remove portions of the video. Values are in seconds.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `trimBefore` 和 `trimAfter` 来移除视频的部分内容。数值以秒为单位。

entries.en-US: ## Delaying
entries.zh-Hans: ## 延迟

entries.en-US: Wrap the video in a `<Sequence>` to delay when it appears:
entries.zh-Hans: 将视频包裹在 `<Sequence>` 中以延迟其出现时间：

entries.en-US: The video will appear after 1 second.
entries.zh-Hans: 视频将在 1 秒后出现。

entries.en-US: ## Sizing and Position
entries.zh-Hans: ## 尺寸和位置

entries.en-US: Use the `style` prop to control size and position:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `style` 属性来控制尺寸和位置：

entries.en-US: ## Volume
entries.zh-Hans: ## 音量

entries.en-US: Set a static volume (0 to 1):
entries.zh-Hans: 设置静态音量（0 到 1）：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} volume={0.5} />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} volume={0.5} />
```

entries.en-US: Or use a callback for dynamic volume based on the current frame:
entries.zh-Hans: 或者使用回调函数根据当前帧动态调整音量：

entries.en-US: Use `muted` to silence the video entirely:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `muted` 来完全静音视频：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} muted />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} muted />
```

entries.en-US: ## Speed
entries.zh-Hans: ## 速度

entries.en-US: Use `playbackRate` to change the playback speed:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `playbackRate` 来改变播放速度：

entries.en-US: Reverse playback is not supported.
entries.zh-Hans: 不支持反向播放。

entries.en-US: ## Looping
entries.zh-Hans: ## 循环

entries.en-US: Use `loop` to loop the video indefinitely:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `loop` 来无限循环视频：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} loop />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video src={staticFile("video.mp4")} loop />
```

entries.en-US: Use `loopVolumeCurveBehavior` to control how the frame count behaves when looping:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `loopVolumeCurveBehavior` 来控制循环时帧计数的行为：

entries.en-US:
- `"repeat"`: Frame count resets to 0 each loop (for `volume` callback)
- `"extend"`: Frame count continues incrementing
entries.zh-Hans:
* `"repeat"`：每次循环帧计数重置为 0（适用于 `volume` 回调）
* `"extend"`：帧计数持续递增

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  loop
  loopVolumeCurveBehavior="extend"
  volume={(f) => interpolate(f, [0, 300], [1, 0])} // Fade out over multiple loops
/>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  loop
  loopVolumeCurveBehavior="extend"
  volume={(f) => interpolate(f, [0, 300], [1, 0])} // Fade out over multiple loops
/>
```

entries.en-US: ## Pitch
entries.zh-Hans: ## 音高

entries.en-US: Use `toneFrequency` to adjust the pitch without affecting speed. Values range from 0.01 to 2:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `toneFrequency` 来调整音高而不影响速度。数值范围从 0.01 到 2：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  toneFrequency={1.5} // Higher pitch
/>
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  toneFrequency={0.8} // Lower pitch
/>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  toneFrequency={1.5} // Higher pitch
/>
<Video
  src={staticFile("video.mp4")}
  toneFrequency={0.8} // Lower pitch
/>
```

entries.en-US: Pitch shifting only works during server-side rendering, not in the Remotion Studio preview or in the `<Player />`.
entries.zh-Hans: 音高变换仅在服务器端渲染时有效，在 Remotion Studio 预览或 `<Player />` 中无效。
